zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice of Rethel於大約1131年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾時，她的父親Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel32歲，母親Beatrix of Namur22歲。她於1151年與Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年3月30日在義大利西西利亞享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice of Rethel于大约1131年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾时，她的父亲Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel32岁，母亲Beatrix of Namur22岁。她于1151年与Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年3月30日在意大利西西利亞享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Rethel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 19th-century revival of an Old English name, a short form of various female personal names containing ethel ‘noble’ as a first element, for example Etheldreda . The name enjoyed great popularity for a period at the beginning of the 20th century but is at present out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice of Rethel was born about 1131, in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel, was 32 and her mother, Beatrix of Namur, was 22. She married Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile in 1151. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 30 March 1185, in Sicily, Italy, at the age of 55.

fr.Vitre, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice of Rethel est née environ 1131, à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrix of Namur, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile en 1151. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 mars 1185, à Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Vitre, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice of Rethel um 1131 in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel 32 und ihre Mutter Beatrix of Namur 22. Sie hat 1151 Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. März 1185 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Sizilien, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice of Rethel è nata il circa 1131 nel Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Beatrix of Namur, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile nel 1151. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 30 marzo 1185, nel Sicilia, Italia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice of Rethelが約1131年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルで生まれた時，父Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethelは32歳，母Beatrix of Namurは22歳であった。1151年にRoger II de Sicile Roi de Sicileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年3月30日にイタリアシシリアで55歳で死去した。

ko.Vitre, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice of Rethel(이)가 대략 1131년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix of Namur(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1151년 Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 3월 30일 이탈리아 시실리야에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice of Rethel nasceu aproximadamente 1131, em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix of Namur, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile em 1151. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de março de 1185, em Sicilia, Itália, com 55 anos.

ru.Vitre, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice of Rethel родилась около 1131 г. в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix of Namur, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile в 1151 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 марта 1185 г. в местности сисиля, Италия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice of Rethel nació aproximadamente 1131, en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Gauthier "le Dévôt" de Réthel comte de Rethel, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Beatrix of Namur, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Roger II de Sicile Roi de Sicile en 1151. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1185, en Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 55 años.
